item.title: Man and his dog survive Insane hit and run on freeway!
item.description: A man and his dog survive a serious hit-and-run on the freeway, highlighting their resilience and the importance of road safety, told in a factual and respectful way.

media:content.media:title: Man and his dog survive Insane hit and run on freeway!
media:content.media:description: A man and his dog survive a serious hit-and-run on the freeway, highlighting their resilience and the importance of road safety, told in a factual and respectful way.

item.title: Tow Bandit Shows up to my Rollover Accident Scene!
item.description: A look at an unexpected tow truck arriving at a rollover accident, highlighting the situation, challenges, and reactions at the scene.

media:content.media:title: Tow Bandit Shows up to my Rollover Accident Scene!
media:content.media:description: A look at an unexpected tow truck arriving at a rollover accident, highlighting the situation, challenges, and reactions at the scene.

item.title: Major trailer crash leaves thousands of Coke bottles on freeway - crazy recovery
item.description: A massive trailer wreck scatters thousands of Coke bottles across the freeway in one unbelievable recovery scene.

media:content.media:title: Major trailer crash leaves thousands of Coke bottles on freeway - crazy recovery
media:content.media:description: A massive trailer wreck scatters thousands of Coke bottles across the freeway in one unbelievable recovery scene.

item.title: Tow Truck Gets stuck After Backhoe Rollover
item.description: What starts as a backhoe rollover recovery quickly gets worse when the tow truck ends up stuck too.

media:content.media:title: Tow Truck Gets stuck After Backhoe Rollover
media:content.media:description: What starts as a backhoe rollover recovery quickly gets worse when the tow truck ends up stuck too.
